title: OCGN Earnings Dates and Forecasts
text: Ocugen earnings calendar and forecasts. Next OCGN earnings release expected May 13, 2025. Analysts expect company to report earnings of -$0.06 per share, reflecting year-over-year decrease of 25%. Q4 2024 announced Dec 31, 2024 with earnings of -$13.9M, up 7% from previous quarter. Full fiscal year 2024 ending Dec 31, 2024: annual earnings -$54.0M with -14.4% growth. Q3 2024 revenue $1.136M reported Nov 8, 2024. Q2 2024 revenue $1.141M reported Aug 8, 2024. Historical Q1 2024: EPS beat estimates at -5 cents vs -6 cents forecast. Revenue $1.01M. Company remains pre-commercial with minimal revenues, focused on advancing three late-stage clinical programs toward approval.
